rules: frontend renders product title as a single main title; renderedSubtitle must stay empty
retail-zone productName is the canonical frontend title and feeds sku.name/product_master.canonical_name in SQLite
computer categories should include platform title plus key configuration in the main title
items marked needs_platform_detail_collection are evidence gaps only, not a reason to render a subtitle line
